Class ProductBLL

java.lang.Object
businessLayer.ProductBLL
public class ProductBLL extends Object
The ProductBLL class handles the business logic for managing products. It interacts with the ProductDAO to retrieve and modify product data.

  • Method Details

    • findAllProducts

      public List<Product> findAllProducts() throws BusinessException
      Retrieves all products from the database.
      Returns:
      List of all products.
      Throws:
      BusinessException - If there is an error while retrieving products from the database.

    • findProductById

      public Product findProductById(int id) throws BusinessException
      Retrieves a product by its ID.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the product.
      Returns:
      The product corresponding to the given ID.
      Throws:
      BusinessException - If the ID is invalid or there is an error retrieving the product.

    • insertProduct

      public void insertProduct(Product product) throws BusinessException
      Inserts a new product into the database.
      Parameters:
      product - The product to be inserted.
      Throws:
      BusinessException - If there is an error during validation or insertion.

    • updateProduct

      public void updateProduct(Product product) throws BusinessException
      Updates an existing product in the database.
      Parameters:
      product - The product with updated details.
      Throws:
      BusinessException - If the product ID is invalid or there is an error during the update.

    • deleteProduct

      public void deleteProduct(int id) throws BusinessException
      Deletes a product from the database.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the product to be deleted.
      Throws:
      BusinessException - If the ID is invalid or there is an error during deletion.

    • validateProduct

      private void validateProduct(Product product) throws BusinessException
      Validates a product's details before inserting or updating.
      Parameters:
      product - The product to be validated.
      Throws:
      BusinessException - If the product's details are invalid.

    • findProductsBelowStock

      public List<Product> findProductsBelowStock(int threshold) throws BusinessException
      Finds products with stock below a specified threshold.
      Parameters:
      threshold - The stock threshold.
      Returns:
      A list of products with stock below the threshold.
      Throws:
      BusinessException - If the threshold is negative or there is an error retrieving the products.

    • updateProductStock

      public void updateProductStock(int productId, int newStock) throws BusinessException
      Updates the stock for a specific product.
      Parameters:
      productId - The ID of the product.
      newStock - The new stock value.
      Throws:
      BusinessException - If the product ID is invalid or the stock is negative.
